name: Boulevard Limousine Co
recent_news: Yelp lists 'Boulevard Limo' in Manchester, NH as CLOSED as of April 2026; appears to be a defunct/wound-down livery operation, not a school bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a viable Summit tuck-in target. Two-employee limo/livery operation, no evidence of school-bus or special-needs student transport contracts; business reportedly closed per Yelp listing. Skip.

name: Cardinal Care Transportation
recent_news: No public M&A or contract news. No website found; not listed among Manchester School District specialized transportation vendors (which are Easterseals NH, MTA, Butler's Bus, STA). Profile consistent with a micro NEMT/private-pay transport service, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a viable Summit tuck-in target. Two-employee owner-operator with no evidence of yellow-bus or K-12 contracts. Likely NEMT/elder transport. Skip.

name: Canadian Limousine Svc
recent_news: No public school-transport activity found. Rockwall ISD transportation appears in-house/contracted with other vendors; no link to this single-vehicle livery operator at a residential address (134 Southampton Dr, Rockwall).
fit_notes: Not a viable Summit tuck-in target. Two-employee limo/livery at a residential address; no school-bus, SPED, or NEMT contract footprint. Skip.

name: Advanced Cabulance Transport
recent_news: Active two-person NEMT operator in Wichita providing ADA-compliant non-emergency medical transport (ambulatory, wheelchair, stretcher) 24/7. No school district contracts identified.
fit_notes: Not a viable Summit tuck-in target. Pure NEMT/cabulance service, not a school-bus or SPED student transport contractor. Out of scope for Summit's K-12 platform. Skip.

name: Michigan Essential Transport

Suite-address footprint and lack of phone listing are consistent with a micro NEMT operator.
